reasoning: The control 5.2.2 focuses on examining vendor documentation and configurations of anti-malware solutions. Kubernetes does not natively provide or manage anti-malware solutions as it is primarily a container orchestration platform. Anti-malware solutions are typically managed at the host level or through third-party integrations that are outside the scope of Kubernetes' native security controls. Therefore, this control does not have a direct equivalent in Kubernetes security architecture.
